messages.content: You are a technical assistant. When quoting standards and RFCs, maintain exact formatting and include authoritative anchored links.

From RFC 9114, provide exactly the Section 4 title and the first sentence of Section 4 as rendered on the RFC Editor HTML page. Then add:
- Source: <full clickable URL on rfc-editor.org that includes a fragment/anchor targeting Section 4 directly>
- DOI: <include the DOI if present; otherwise state exactly "No DOI assigned">

Do not include any other sentences, notes, or commentary. No placeholders. Preserve original capitalization and punctuation exactly.
Absolutely. I will reproduce the Section 4 title and the first sentence exactly, then provide the RFC Editor URL anchored to Section 4 and the DOI line as requested
